title: Aliasing, Effective Type, Provenance, and Type Punning · Mastery Check
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar aliasing, effective type, provenance, and type punning decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for defined binary decoder with provenance notes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Access allocated and copied storage through types permitted by effective-type rules or defined character-byte paths.
Preserve optimizer-visible non-aliasing rules and test any deliberate compiler-extension policy.
Use memcpy into a live destination object for representation transfer and validate the resulting value domain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Provenance Ts Review
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz native-systems team handles memory case 8661. Produce bounded C evidence to decode representation bytes through a defined copy; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply ISO/IEC TS 6010 provenance concepts as reviewed guidance without mislabeling them as universally implemented C23 behavior.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Provenance Ts Review.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply iso/iec ts 6010 provenance concepts as reviewed guidance without mislabeling them as universally implemented c23 behavior. For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Provenance Ts Review, keep Provenance Ts Review connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
